refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imtranslate3(volume, offset); out = imtranslate3(volume, offset, fillValue)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Translates a volume by [dx dy dz] using nearest-neighbor sampling and returns a double precision volume with the requested fill value.

refsection.title: Examples
